title: Illumine Blocks
description: This simple mod adds Glass/Glass pane, Concrete, and Slab versions of the blocks of all colors with light strength of 15
body:
# Illumine Blocks
 
- Adds Glass/Glass(all colors) panes with a light strength of 15
- Adds Concrete(all colors) with a light strength of 15
- Adds Glass slabs(all colors) with a light strength of 15
- Adds Concrete slabs (all colors) with a light strength of 15

### Todo: Add ability to place the different slabs on each other.
